calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Re: Pltfs' Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Crozier #4761

Daniel Brome, Esq. appeared for plaintiff The Board of Trustee, in their capacities as Trustee of the Laborers Health and Welfare Grust Fund for Northern California; et al.
Plaintiff's Witness John Hagan was placed under oath and testified.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Leo Sanchez ind. and dba. Sanchez Grading.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Principal $11,154.93
Damages $8,700.00
Prejudgment Interest $11,529.78
Attorneys' Fees $18,540.00
Costs $962.92 for a total judgment in the amount of $50,887.63
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
